matcher.subject: Science (086)
matcher.coveragePreview: chemical reactions and equations - session 1 grade 10 students (cbse/icse curriculum) chemical reactions physical vs chemical changes word equations balancing chemical equations chemical reactions and equations introduction to chemical changes what is happening when wood burns? why does iron rust over time? how do we record chemical changes? distinguishing physical and chemical changes physical vs chemical changes physical change: no new substance formed. chemical change: new substances with different properties. key signs of chemical reaction: - color change - gas evolution (bubbles) - temperature change how do we know? signs of reactions signs of chemical change 1. evolution of gas (bubbles) 2. change in color 3. formation of precipitate 4. temperature change from words to equations: the basics word equations reactants → products example: hydrogen + oxygen → water arrow (→) means 'yields' or 'produces' read left to right the language of chemistry: chemical equations chemical symbols and state notation chemical symbols: h (hydrogen), o (oxygen) formulas: h₂o (water) state symbols: - (s) solid - (l) liquid - (g) gas - (aq) aqueous solution why must we balance? the law of conserv...
